---
title: "quick_check.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/debug/quick_check.py"
loc: 31
complexity: 5
logic_score: 3.32
style_score: 3.82
intel_score: 9.14
overall_score: 5.97
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating QuickCheck, execute.

## Interaction Protocol
Import QuickCheck and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 20 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `QuickCheck`
- `execute`
